title: SmartNameTags
description: Elevate your Minecraft journey with the SmartNameTags mod, where your ability to navigate the shadows and wield stealth becomes your greatest asset. Embrace the power of invisibility, surprise your adversaries, and reshape the course of your adventures.
body:
![SmartNametags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a909c11a2d61658688a697d177cb3820b8824c2_0.webp)

Dependencies:: SmartNameTags is developed ONLY for Fabric so you must have installed Fabric API

Unleash a new level of tactical or RP gameplay with the SmartNameTags mod. Immerse yourself in the art of subterfuge and surprise as you seamlessly blend into the shadows, your nametag vanishing from view when you find yourself hidden behind walls, underground, or concealed by blocks. This innovative mod empowers you to master the art of stealth, allowing you to navigate the terrain unnoticed and catch your foes off guard.

Nametag Concealment: Say goodbye to conventional nametags that reveal your presence to others. SmartNameTags elevates your gameplay by automatically hiding your nametag when you're positioned behind solid obstacles. Whether you're lurking in the depths of a cavern, stalking through dense foliage, or strategically positioned behind walls, your nametag remains concealed, giving you the element of surprise.

Compatibility: SmartNameTags seamlessly integrates into Minecraft, ensuring a smooth and stable experience alongside your favorite mods. Dive into a world of innovation without sacrificing the mods you love.

Elevate your Minecraft journey with the SmartNameTags mod, where your ability to navigate the shadows and wield stealth becomes your greatest asset. Embrace the power of invisibility, surprise your adversaries, and reshape the course of your adventures. Download SmartNameTags now and embark on a new era of tactical prowess in the world of MC.
